## Summary

This is a narrow #11925 batch for the cloud-deployment-adjacent tenant-repo-sync service. It removes ticket/AC/cycle archaeology from production comments in `TenantRepoSyncService.mjs` and rewrites the same comments into durable operational intent.

No runtime behavior changes.

## Changes

- Replaced `#11942` / AC / cycle anchors in concurrency-gate comments with current deployment-capacity wording.
- Replaced the error-code table trigger text with the durable `concurrencyGateTimeoutMs` condition.
- Reframed bootstrap-spread, due-check, success/failure persistence, and legacy persistence comments around the actual invariants.
- Preserved current config keys, error-code names, public paths, log payloads, and test traceability.

## Deltas From Ticket

Partial contribution only. #11925 remains open for the remaining daemon, script, config-template, and residual `ai/` source-comment surfaces.

## Test Evidence

- `rg -n "#11942|AC1|AC2|per ticket|post-#11942|cycle-2|pre-#11942|ticket prescription" ai/daemons/orchestrator/services/TenantRepoSyncService.mjs` -> 0 source matches.
- `node --check ai/daemons/orchestrator/services/TenantRepoSyncService.mjs` -> PASS.

- `git diff --cached --check` -> PASS before commit.
- `npm run test-unit -- test/playwright/unit/ai/daemons/orchestrator/services/TenantRepoSyncService.spec.mjs` -> 27/27 PASS.
